Container.Name: smart-garage
Container.Overview: Smart Garage — self-hosted vehicle management. Maintenance schedules, fuel tracking with analytics, expenses, documents, and reminders. Single container, SQLite database, no compose required.
Container.Description:
Smart Garage is a self-hosted vehicle management app for homelab and NAS users.
**Features** - Open registration — create as many local accounts as you need - Vehicle profiles with images and odometer tracking - Maintenance schedules and service history - Fuel log with consumption charts and projected annual usage - Expenses and document storage - English and German UI
**First run** 1. Install the container 2. Open the WebUI 3. Register your account (first user becomes admin) 4. Add a vehicle
**Data** is stored in the AppData path (SQLite database + uploads).
Documentation: https://github.com/flizzy27/smart-garage/blob/main/docs/UNRAID.md
Container.Changes: ### 2026.06.19 - Initial Community Applications template - Configurable web port and upload size limit

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: SQLite database and uploaded files (images, PDFs). Created automatically by Unraid.

Config.Name: Max upload size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum document upload size in megabytes (PDF, receipts).

Config.Name: Max image size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum vehicle image upload size in megabytes.
